roles.name: Godfather
roles.description: Immune to night kills and investigations. Chooses the Mafia's target each night.

roles.name: Mob Goon
roles.description: A member of the Mafia.

roles.name: Town Cop
roles.description: Investigates one player each night to learn their alignment.

roles.name: Doctor
roles.description: Protects one player each night from being killed.

roles.name: Plain Townie
roles.description: A regular member of the town.

roles.name: Serial Killer
roles.description: Immune to night kills and investigations. Kills one player each night.
